description_long: This is a dark, polygonal barrel with a matte finish, featuring three prominent horizontal reinforcement bands that appear metallic or painted in a contrasting color. The body of the barrel is faceted, giving it a slightly angular appearance rather than being perfectly cylindrical. The surface is adorned with partial white text, suggesting it may have once contained food or industrial goods, and the text is partially obscured or wrapped around the barrel. The top of the barrel is open, and a matching lid is visible nearby, indicating that the barrel can be closed. The interior appears hollow and dark, suitable for storing or transporting materials. The overall design suggests it is robust and utilitarian, likely intended for use in urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark, faceted barrel with three metallic reinforcement bands, partial white text, and a removable lid. The barrel has a utilitarian, industrial look and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, partial white text, and the lid placed on the ground beside the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the barrel's faceted surface, metallic bands, and more visible white text wrapping around the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid on the ground, showing the back of the barrel and the three reinforcement bands.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the open top, partial text, and the overall polygonal shape of the barrel.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metallic reinforcement bands around the body
attribute_labeling_or_markings: partial white text and company markings
